# sirrlock/homebrew-tap — Sirr Homebrew Tap

Homebrew tap for Sirr — the ephemeral secret manager.

## Install

brew tap sirrlock/tap
brew install sirrlock/tap/sirrd   # Server daemon
brew install sirrlock/tap/sirr    # CLI client

## Run as service

brew services start sirrlock/tap/sirrd

## Formulas

sirrd — Sirr server daemon (self-hosted ephemeral secret vault)
sirr  — Sirr CLI client (push, get, and manage secrets)

## Source

github.com/sirrlock/homebrew-tap
